headline: Cintas UniFirst Talks Highlight Control Premium And Sector Shake Up Potential
summary: Cintas is in advanced talks to acquire UniFirst (NYSE:UNF), according to recent reports. The potential deal would bring together two large uniform and business services providers. Discussions are described as advanced, with independent advisors reportedly involved in the process. If completed, the transaction could reshape competition and customer options across the sector. UniFirst focuses on uniform rental, facility services, and related programs for businesses, while Cintas operates...

headline: UniFirst, Elastic NV, and More Stocks See Action From Activist Investors
summary: 13D FILINGS These disclosures are from 13Ds filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission. 13Ds are filed within 10 days of an entity’s attaining more than 5% in any class of a company’s securities.
